brief_notes: Well-structured biomedical engineering paper with detailed design specification tables, impedance characterization with paired t-test, longitudinal MRI scoring, IHC quantification normalized to contralateral controls, seizure recording SNR values, and canine deployment metrics. The cross-species validation (rat to canine) strengthens translational claims. The comparison table against other modalities is informative. Some IHC sample sizes are small (n=4 per timepoint).
